title: Phase B: HMM Regime Detection Gate Activation
summary: Gate met (406 eligible trades). Added training-store phase gate to get_hmm_regime_spy(). 20 new tests.

what_changed.change: Added gate_min_eligible_trades: 200 to hmm_regime config block. Explicit threshold for the runtime gate check added to signals/__init__.py.

Added phase gate check in get_hmm_regime_spy(): calls training_store.count_eligible() at runtime; returns {regime: unknown, source: gate_not_met, eligible_trades: N} when below threshold. Degraded records (ml_eligible=False) are excluded from the count. Gate is currently met (406 >= 200) — no behavioral change in production.

New test file. 20 tests across 3 classes: TestHmmFit2State (5 tests: state ordering, row-stochastic A, output shapes, bear/bull classification), TestGetHmmRegimeSpy (8 tests: required keys, bull-ending/bear-ending regimes, disabled config, insufficient data, fetch error, cache TTL, confidence validity), TestHmmGate (7 tests: below threshold, count_eligible not count, degraded records excluded, legacy records included, exactly-at-threshold passes, eligible_trades in response, configurable threshold).
Added 2026-05-20 entry: Phase B HMM Advisory Active. Documents gate met, architecture (advisory weight router vs scanner replacement), why count_eligible not count, live execution impact.
Updated Current State: Phase B line updated from Unlocked to Active. Test suite count updated to 2836. Regime detector line updated to reflect HMM advisory active in weight router.

decisions_made: HMM phase gate uses training_store.count_eligible() not count(). Degraded records cannot inflate the gate count. This is consistent with the metadata preservation rule: compromised metadata = compromised training signal.

HMM activation is advisory in signal weight router (momentum vs mean_reversion multipliers), not a replacement of scanner.get_market_regime(). Scanner-level replacement is the next Tier 3 step pending Amit approval.
gate_min_eligible_trades=200 is configurable via config — not hardcoded. Allows adjustment without code changes.

tests.new: 20 new tests in test_hmm_regime.py — all passing
tests.full_suite: 2836 passing, 8 failing (all pre-existing, confirmed by stash run), 5 skipped

what_is_next: Tier 3 decision required before scanner-level HMM replacement: replace scanner.get_market_regime() VIX-proxy with HMM probability output. This is the full Phase B roadmap item. Requires design approval (data contract change, regime_states tuple update, scanner rewrite).
Walk-forward weight calibration remains blocked on scanner-level HMM replacement.
Phase C/D (Alphalens, ML engine) — still awaiting Amit approval.
